auth_env_var_specs.name: TMDB_API_KEY
auth_env_var_specs.description: TMDb v3 API key required for Movie GOAT API requests.

auth_env_var_specs.name: OMDB_API_KEY
auth_env_var_specs.description: Optional OMDb key that enables IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic enrichment.

auth_title: TMDb v3 API Key (32-char hex; sent as ?api_key=… query param, not Bearer header)

novel_features.name: Tonight Picker
novel_features.description: Pick what to watch tonight from trending titles actually streaming on your services.

novel_features.name: Multi-Source Ratings Card
novel_features.description: TMDb + IMDb + Rotten Tomatoes + Metacritic ratings for any title in one card.

novel_features.name: Marathon Planner
novel_features.description: Plan a franchise marathon with watch order, total runtime, and suggested breaks.

novel_features.name: Career Timeline
novel_features.description: Explore any actor or director's full filmography with ratings and chronology.

novel_features.name: Watchlist
novel_features.description: Local SQLite watchlist; flag rows that are streamable on your services.

novel_features.name: Head-to-Head Versus
novel_features.description: Compare two movies or shows side-by-side across ratings, cast, runtime, and streaming.

novel_features.name: Recommendation Queue
novel_features.description: Suggest next-watch picks derived from your watchlist's recommendations and similars.

novel_features.name: Recurring Collaborators
novel_features.description: List people who appear in 2+ of a person's credits, with count and titles.

description: The movie CLI that combines TMDb's discovery engine with OMDb's multi-source ratings — and ships a SQLite watchlist that flags what's streaming on your services right now.
